subject: Inventory Management System
description: Simulated stdlib/helper upgrades: measure cost of adapting to API changes.

scenarios.description: helpers_generate_id(prefix) now requires a second parameter: helpers_generate_id(prefix, length). All call sites must be updated. AILang has no default params.
acceptance: All call sites updated to pass length parameter
No calls to helpers_generate_id with 1 argument remain

scenarios.description: storage_add is deprecated in favor of storage_insert. storage_add remains as an alias. All call sites must migrate.
acceptance: All call sites use storage_insert instead of storage_add
storage_add still exists as an alias
Zero calls to storage_add remain in app code
